payload.note: ROUTE PLAN (replaces dead-end `while (true) (size ns1 - i)` which yields unprovable post `!guard => forged`). EasyCrypt source facts (verified in ecPhlWhile.ml/ecPhlSeq.ml): for [<=] bdhoare the loop rule is `while (Inv)` with NO variant (rev rule). It generates: (G1) hypothesis-implication `phoare[w:Inv==>post]<=bd => phoare[body;w : Inv/\guard ==> post] <= bd` with w an abstract stmt (intro with move=> H; discharge w-goals via conseq H); (G2) hoare[prefix : pre ==> Inv /\ gen-mod(Inv/\!guard/\post => bd=1)]. Bound bd is STATE-DEPENDENT, evaluated at each judgment's initial memory. PLAN branch A (ns1 loop, post UF.forged, bd big f ns1 * pr_zeropol, f n0 = (size(filter (c.`1=n0) Mem.lc))%r): (1) undo x2 back to post-`wp.` state; (2) `conseq (: _ ==> _ : (if UF.forged then 1%r else big f (drop i ns1) * pr_zeropol))` [side: pre has forged=false,i=0, drop0]; (3) `while (Inv)` with Inv := ns,ns1 defs /\ 0<=i /\ (forall n', (n',C.ofintd 0) \in RO.m => !(n' \in drop i ns1)) [RO.m = ROIN's poly_in map; freshness makes LRO.get return the fresh sample]; (4) G1: move=> H; case @ UF.forged: true-branch conseq to 1%r + trivial (t_prbounded closes <=1); false-branch `seq 3 : (UF.forged) (f (nth witness ns1 i) * pr_zeropol) (1%r) (1%r) (big f (drop (i+1) ns1) * pr_zeropol) (phi)` where phi = defs /\ 0<=i<size ns1 /\ freshness-at-(i+1). NOTE seq condnm side-goal requires s1 NOT modify f2/g2 exprs => split MUST be at 3 (before i<-i+1). Subgoal order: cond_phi(hoare s1=>phi), condf1(event: inline*; rcondt the get-if via freshness+drop_nth; wp;rnd;auto; close with pr_TPI_ok_filter), condf2<=1 trivial, condg1<=1 trivial, condg2([i<-i+1;w]): exlim i => i0 (also ns1,Mem.lc if needed); conseq to i0-based bound; sp 1; conseq H; smt. condbd: drop_nth + BRA.big_cons arithmetic. condnm: move=> r1 r2; inline*; auto. (5) G2: prefix empty => skip => />; smt(mem_empty drop0). Branch B (ns2 loop, bad2, pr1_poly_out): same machinery, NO freshness needed; per-iter event t<$dpoly_out; t\in lt: mu_mem_le_mu1 + dpoly_out_funi (mu1 x = pr1_poly_out); size lt via size_map. Outer seq-2 condbd arithmetic: perm_filterC (ns1++ns2 ~ ns), size_filter=count, count_map, sum-count-over-undup = size identity (find stdlib name), size lc <= qdec, pz/p1 <= maxr.
